seo.title: Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist — Trusted Neighbourhood Pharmacy in Ahmedabad
seo.description: Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist is a trusted neighbourhood pharmacy in Ghatlodia, Ahmedabad, serving families for over 21 years with genuine medicines, healthcare products, wellness essentials, and caring, expert support.

about.eyebrow: About Aarav Pharmacy · 21 years of care
about.lede: Welcome to Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist — your trusted destination for quality healthcare, genuine medicines, and caring service, serving families in Ghatlodia, Ahmedabad for over 21 years.
about.description: We offer a complete range of prescription medicines, OTC products, baby care, personal care, wellness products, surgical items, and daily healthcare essentials. With a customer-first approach, we focus on reliable service, accurate dispensing, and professional support to help you stay healthy and confident. Our mission is to provide trusted healthcare solutions with quality medicines, professional service, and compassionate care for every customer — and our vision is to be the most trusted, customer-friendly pharmacy for families and communities.

items.question: Where are you located?
items.answer: Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist is at 3, Rajyog Complex, opposite Hotel Unity & Hotel Relis, near Nirman Tower, R.C. Technical Road, Chanakyapuri, Ghatlodia, Ahmedabad 380061.

items.question: How can I get in touch?
items.answer: You can call us at 98983 89140, email aaravpharmacy5645@gmail.com, or message us on WhatsApp for support and enquiries during business hours — or simply visit us in-store.

items.question: Are your medicines genuine?
items.answer: Yes. We stock only authentic, quality medicines and healthcare products, dispensed accurately by our registered pharmacist.

items.question: How do I order from Aarav Pharmacy?
items.answer: You can order through the Aarav Pharmacy mobile app (available on Google Play and the App Store), or by visiting or calling our store in Ghatlodia, Ahmedabad. This website is an informational profile and does not process orders or payments itself — it simply links you to our app. Orders are fulfilled by our registered pharmacist, and prescription medicines require a valid prescription, in accordance with applicable Indian regulations.

items.question: Can I order medicines on WhatsApp?
items.answer: WhatsApp is available for general support and enquiries only — you can message us with questions and our team will be happy to help. To place an order, please use the Aarav Pharmacy app or visit or call the store.

items.question: Do you offer home delivery?
items.answer: Yes, we offer reliable medicine delivery within the neighbourhood for your convenience. You can arrange it through the Aarav Pharmacy app or by calling the store.

This website is an informational profile and is provided for general information only — it does not itself process orders or payments. To order, you can use the Aarav Pharmacy mobile app or contact our store by phone or in person; orders are fulfilled and medicines dispensed by a registered pharmacist, with prescription medicines requiring a valid prescription from a registered medical practitioner, in accordance with the Drugs & Cosmetics Act, 1940 and Rules, 1945. This website is not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis, advice, or treatment — always consult a qualified medical practitioner before starting, stopping, or changing any medication.

disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
body: Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist is a licensed retail pharmacy located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat (GST No. 24FGNPM4289R1Z9). The information on this website is provided in good faith for general informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.

This website is an informational profile of our pharmacy. It does not itself sell products or process orders or payments. Ordering is available through the Aarav Pharmacy mobile app, or by visiting or calling our store; orders are fulfilled and medicines dispensed by a registered pharmacist, with prescription medicines requiring a valid prescription, in accordance with the Drugs & Cosmetics Act, 1940 and Rules, 1945. We do not offer Schedule X, narcotic, or other habit-forming drugs for online sale.

We make no representation or warranty, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, availability, or completeness of any information on this website. Any reliance you place on such information is strictly at your own risk. Always consult a qualified medical practitioner before starting, stopping, or changing any medication.

privacyPolicy.heading: Privacy Policy
body: This Privacy Policy explains how Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist ("we", "us", or "our") handles information in connection with this website. Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist is a licensed retail pharmacy located at 3, Rajyog Complex, Opp. Hotel Unity & Hotel Relis, Near Nirman Tower, R.C. Technical Road, Chanakyapuri, Ghatlodia, Ahmedabad 380061, Gujarat, India (GST No. 24FGNPM4289R1Z9).

This website is an informational business profile. It does not itself process orders or payments, and we do not operate an online store, shopping cart, checkout, or customer account system on this website. The website may link you to the Aarav Pharmacy mobile app and to WhatsApp; any ordering, account, or data handling that takes place in the app or on WhatsApp is governed by the privacy terms of those respective platforms and services, not by this policy.

Because this is an informational website, we do not require you to create an account or submit personal or health information to browse it. Any contact you choose to make with us — by phone, email, WhatsApp, or in person — is handled directly by our pharmacy team for the purpose of responding to your enquiry.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
body: We collect only limited information through this website:

items: Contact information you voluntarily provide if you email or call us using the details listed on this site (such as your name, phone number, or email address) — used solely to respond to your enquiry.

Basic, non-identifying technical and analytics data that your browser automatically shares (such as device type, browser, and general usage patterns) used only to keep the website running and to understand general traffic.

body: We do not collect prescriptions, medical history, payment card details, or other sensitive personal information through this website.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Information
body: Any information we receive is used only to respond to your enquiries, provide information about our pharmacy and services, and maintain and improve this website. We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties.

sections.heading: 3. Cookies & Analytics
body: This website may use basic cookies or analytics tools to understand general usage and keep the site functioning. You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies will not prevent you from viewing the informational content on this site.

sections.heading: 4. Information Sharing
body: We do not share personal information with third parties except where required by law, or with trusted service providers (such as website hosting or analytics) who process limited data on our behalf and are bound to protect it. We may disclose information if required to do so by a valid legal request from a competent authority.

sections.heading: 5. Data Security
body: We take reasonable measures to protect the limited information associated with this website. However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: 6. Children's Privacy
body: This website is intended for a general audience and is not directed at children. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

sections.heading: 7. Changes to This Policy
body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page. We encourage you to review it periodically.

sections.heading: 8. Contact Us
body: For any questions about this Privacy Policy, contact Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist at aaravpharmacy5645@gmail.com or call +91 98983 89140, or visit us at 3, Rajyog Complex, Opp. Hotel Unity & Hotel Relis, Near Nirman Tower, R.C. Technical Road, Chanakyapuri, Ghatlodia, Ahmedabad 380061.

termsAndConditions.heading: Terms & Conditions
body: These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of the Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist website. By accessing or using this website, you agree to these Terms. Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist is a licensed retail pharmacy located at 3, Rajyog Complex, Opp. Hotel Unity & Hotel Relis, Near Nirman Tower, R.C. Technical Road, Chanakyapuri, Ghatlodia, Ahmedabad 380061, Gujarat, India (GST No. 24FGNPM4289R1Z9).

sections.heading: 1. Nature of This Website
body: This website is an informational business profile of our pharmacy. The website itself does not accept orders, process payments, or operate a shopping cart or checkout. Instead, it links you to the Aarav Pharmacy mobile app and to our store and support channels, where ordering takes place.

All product and service information on this website is provided for general awareness only and does not, by itself, constitute an offer for sale. Links to third-party platforms — including the Google Play Store, the Apple App Store, and WhatsApp — are governed by the terms and policies of those respective third parties.

sections.heading: 2. Medicines & Prescriptions
body: Medicines are dispensed by a registered pharmacist — whether you order through the Aarav Pharmacy app or visit our store. Prescription medicines are dispensed only against a valid prescription from a registered medical practitioner, in accordance with the Drugs & Cosmetics Act, 1940 and Rules, 1945. We do not offer Schedule X, narcotic, or other habit-forming drugs for online sale. Nothing on this website should be taken as medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

sections.heading: 3. Use of the Website
body: You agree to use this website only for lawful, informational purposes. You may not attempt to disrupt the website, gain unauthorised access to its systems, or misuse any content on it.

sections.heading: 4. Intellectual Property
body: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of Aarav Pharmacy & Druggist or its licensors and is protected by applicable laws. You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute it without prior written permission.

sections.heading: 5. Disclaimer & Limitation of Liability
body: This website is provided on an "as is" basis without warranties of any kind. We make no guarantee as to the accuracy or completeness of the information provided and are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your use of this website. Any reliance on the information is at your own risk.

sections.heading: 6. Governing Law
body: These Terms are governed by the laws of India, and any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of Ahmedabad, Gujarat.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
body: For any questions about these Terms, contact us at aaravpharmacy5645@gmail.com or call +91 98983 89140.
